SiteLocation: Upper end of N-facing basin, approx. 1/4 mile N of trail at 4000 foot saddle; as with last two plots this is an open desert transition chaparral with 2 layer shrub structure; lower layer is Eriogonum fasciculatum, Ericameria linearifolia, and Lotus scopar
AdditionalNotes: I think all three of the polygons so far are the same series; lots of annuals.

SiteLocation: Approx. 1/4 mile S of raod to Culp Valley from draw bottom to mid slope.; UTM2 to UTM
AdditionalNotes: A mix of Eriogonum fasciculatum and Quercus cornelius-mulleri but Quercus is more of polygon and the Eriogonum dominates below.
